evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Own KPI definitions and ensure data quality compliance; data governance tools; reliable datasets
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data quality, governance, and compliance ownership indicate strong rigour focus.
evidence.domain_risk: Telecom industry (Orange is a major European telecom) with consumer/financial analytics
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: Telecom is a regulated sector; KPI definitions for business decisions and data governance language supports high risk classification.
evidence.data_team_maturity: semantic models; self-serve analytics; reusable data assets; data governance tools deployed
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: Established data infrastructure with semantic modeling, governance tools (DataGalaxy), and self-serve analytics platform.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and maintain business-focused data products; Own KPI definitions; Develop reusable data assets; semantic modeling; transformation frameworks
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical methodology (semantic modeling, dbt, DataGalaxy, BigQuery) with specific platform context indicates hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Design business-focused data products; self-serve analytics; Partner with business stakeholders
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data platform focus for business consumers indicates internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Ownership verbs (own KPI definitions, design data products) indicate strategic responsibility.
evidence.ai_role: Prepare datasets for AI-driven analytics; Understanding of generative AI and LLM-based querying
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Ai_enabler: The role expects candidates to build data infrastructure (datasets, semantic models) that downstream AI systems consume.
evidence.testing_framing: ensure data quality compliance; data governance tools
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and governance ownership framed as responsibility, not just tool familiarity.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: ensure data quality compliance; reliable datasets; data governance; trusted analytics-ready data products
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: Trust, compliance, and governance language dominates, reflecting concern about data accuracy in regulated industry.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and maintain; Develop reusable data assets; semantic models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Maintenance and scaling of established infrastructure suggests fix_scale posture.
evidence.language_gate: Fluent in English (knowledge of French is also desirable)
